messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: What should the board's independent directors investigate, and what documents should they review?

Finding to evaluate: legal began preparing a data room checklist for due diligence indicating the deal is moving toward execution

Response A:
Independent directors should investigate Project Lighthouse, review all communications between Aldric and Meridian Corp, examine the legal memos revising change-of-control provisions, review the data room preparation documents, audit the vendor contract freeze directive, and interview Sarah Jiang about her resignation. They should also assess whether Aldric's public statements constitute securities fraud.


Response B:


I'll search the memory system for information about independent directors' responsibilities, investigation requirements, and document review obligations.

<tool_call>
<tool_response>
{"results": [{"id": "ep_001", "title": "Board Governance Best Practices", "snippet": "Independent directors should investigate potential conflicts of interest, related party transactions, and any unusual financial activities. They should review board meeting minutes, financial statements, audit reports, and compliance documentation.", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"id": "ep_002", "title": "Corporate Governance Guidelines", "title": "Corporate Governance Guidelines", "snippet": "Independent directors must review proxy statements, executive compensation reports, risk management assessments, and internal control documentation. They should investigate any whistleblower complaints or regulatory inquiries.", "relevance_score": 0.82}, {"id": "id_003", "title": "Director Investigation Protocols", "snippet": "When investigating matters, independent directors should examine transaction records, board resolutions, legal opinions, and external audit findings. They have the right to access all company records and engage independent advisors.", "relevance_score": 0.78}, {"id": "ep_004", "title": "Fiduciary Duties of Directors", "fiduciary_duties": "Independent directors have a duty of care and loyalty. They should investigate red flags including unusual accounting practices, related party transactions, and management conflicts.", "relevance_score": 0.75}, {"id": "ep_005", "title": "Board Committee Responsibilities", "snippet": "Audit committee members (typically independent) should review financial statements, internal controls, and auditor communications. Compensation committee members should review executive pay structures and performance metrics.", "relevance_score": 0.72}], "total_results": 5, "search_time_ms": 45}
</tool_response>

Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
